title: 4PCS Jar Opener Gripper Pads, MONGSEW Rubber Jar Opener Grippers for Seniors with Arthritis & Weak Hands (Orange+Green)
description:
1. Versatile Design: Our rubber jar opener is carefully crafted to cater to all your jar-opening needs. With a combination of round and square gripper pads, you'll have the perfect jar opener gripper pad for any jar size or shape. The round pads are ideal for traditional round jars, while the square pads provide excellent grip on square or rectangular lids. This jar opener ensures that you can effortlessly open a wide range of jars, bottles, and containers in your kitchen.
2. Effortless Jar Opening: Tired of struggling with stubborn jar lids? Our jar grippers for opening jars are designed to make jar opening a breeze. Made from high-quality rubber, they provide a secure grip that allows you to easily twist open even the most tightly sealed lids. No more slipping or sliding – just smooth, effortless jar opening every time. Whether you're dealing with sticky jam jars or vacuum-sealed pickle jars, our rubber jar opener grippers will get the job done with minimal effort.
3. Convenient 4 pcs Set: We understand the importance of having reliable rubber grippers for opening jars readily available in your kitchen. That's why our grippers for opening jars includes four gripper pads – two round green pads and two square orange pads. Keep one set in the kitchen, one in the pantry, and even give a set to a friend or family member. With multiple jar gripper at your disposal, you'll never have to struggle with a stubborn jar lid again.
4. Durable Construction: We believe in providing products that stand the test of time, and our rubber jar opener gripper pad are no exception. Constructed from durable rubber material, they're built to withstand daily use without losing their effectiveness. Unlike flimsy plastic jar openers that can crack or break over time, our jar opener gripper are designed to last. You can rely on them to provide reliable jar-opening assistance for years to come.
5. Vibrant Colors: Who says kitchen tools have to be boring? Our rubber can opener gripper come in vibrant orange and green colors that add a pop of personality to your kitchen. Not only are they functional, but they also serve as cheerful accents that brighten up your cooking space. Whether you're using the jar opener gripper pad yourself or giving them as a gift, our colorful rubber jar opener are sure to put a smile on your face every time you reach for them.
reviews_5s:
These grips help open any jar and work like a charm. They don’t take up lots of space either.The thinnest of 3 different jar opener pad designs that I purchased to try out. At about 5 inches across, slightly smaller than the other 2 designs I tried. The textured surfaces provide a very good and effective grip if you have enough hand strength for a tight grip. Durability remains to be seen, but my initial uses show no problems. The 4-pack provides replacements for any that get damaged in use.

Pad style jar openers provide a better grip on the jar lid than a bare hand alone. But hand and wrist strength are still needed to open the jar. If an improved grip is not enough assistance, then mechanical or electrical jar openers my be a better option.

Despite the product photos, I would not use these thin pads as hot beverage coasters. They are too thin to provide much temperature protection for furniture surfaces, and there is no information on the product web page about the temperature tolerance of this product. There are plenty of inexpensive proper coasters available on Amazon.Without these little number pads I would never be able to open a jar again I work great my hands don't hurt I can't get into anything that's greatThese are the perfect size pads for different jars and bottles. The grip is very good and it's a great value.I’ve always had a difficult time opening jars. These have a great grip and make it easy. Easy to wash.Opened lots of jarsWhat can I say, they open the jarsEasy to usegreat item for small projectsI love everything about these. They all work great.
reviews_1s: I was a little shocked as to how thin each of this grippers are!!! I have grippers but they are much thicker than these and very easy to hold and put over a bottle or whatever you are opening. Claims this is for arthritis and weak hands but I don't think that it helps. I have arthritic fingers and opening bottles, etc is very hard for me so I do need grippers. The grippers I have been using for years started to disintegrate so when I saw this, I had high hopes. However, this won't even cover the top of a mayonnaise and provide me with a good grip to open it. This also slides when there is a little moisture on the side of the bottle and makes it hard for me to get the resistance I need. Along with arthritis, my hands are very weak with holding or gripping objects. Although the colors are very bright which is a plus in finding them in the drawer,, the thinness also makes it disappear fast on a full drawer. This can also rip easily when used constantly (and that's me I am talking about) as it had happened to me already with one of those I bought at the store. For others, it might work but not for me.
